examples: Tropical plants like their surroundings bright and humid, while cacti need sunlight but very little water.
Always wear leather gloves when handling cacti.
Plant large cacti at the back of the garden.
The 16 rooms are modern in style, and most overlook the pool and cacti garden.
The no-frills landscape is dotted with pickup trucks, palm trees, window bars, cacti, chain fences and toy-littered lawns.
